creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Where NOT to stay on the Amalfi Coast 🍋

The Amalfi Coast is without a doubt one of the most beautiful parts of Italy and that means you’re not going to be alone when you stroll through the cosy towns - no matter what time of year you’re going 🤓  In my opinion, Positano is the most crowded place on the Amalfi Coast and I didn’t really connect with the town, I found it hard to enjoy the beauty because of the crowds which wasn’t the case on the other places I went to along the Amalfi Coast and in Sorrento 🥰

It was nice spending a few hours in Positano because it IS a beautiful place. But make sure you get there by boat as that is where you really get a feel for the place with all the coloured buildings. 

Comment or send me a DM that says “Amalfihotels” and I’ll send you a link to my favourite areas & places to stay on the Amalfi Coast 🤝  Have you been to Positano? Let me know what you think - is it an overhyped destination, or is it worth staying there?

#amalficoast #italytravel #traveltips #amalfi

transcription.text: Unpopular opinion, but don't stay in Positano if you're going to the Amalfi Coast, instead stay in Amalfi, Ravello, Maiori or even Sorrento for cheaper hotels and a more quiet and less crowded vibe.
